methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q1 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

objectives.title: 2026-Q1 IT Manager outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve Operational reliability score (uptime + incident impact) for IT Manager by advancing harden the platform: security, sso/rbac, integration reliability, and operational observability. through trusted platform foundations.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Ability to keep connected systems available, secure, and performant.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Annual recurring revenue attributable to this persona segment/accounts.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Operational reliability of the landscape during the quarter.

executingTeams.teamName: Data & Integration Platform - Cost Margin Drivers
executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve operational reliability of the landscape via Cost & Margin Drivers Analytics and Event Streaming & Messaging.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for operational reliability of the landscape, aligned with its focus on provide the shared data model, APIs, eventing, analytics, and observability foundation used by all product teams. This team specifically focuses on kpi dashboards via Unified KPI Dashboards and API Gateway & Service Interfaces.

Support the KR by contributing capability for operational reliability of the landscape, aligned with its focus on provide the shared data model, APIs, eventing, analytics, and observability foundation used by all product teams. This team specifically focuses on trend detection via Quality Analytics & Trend Detection and EDI & Partner Connectivity.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

linkedInitiatives.description: Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange initiative focused on improving supplier onboarding & qualification, spec exchange & change notifications, strengthening customer value for Sales Team (Internal), and evolving delivery across web, Supplier Spec API.

Integration & API Fabric initiative focused on improving api gateway & service interfaces, event streaming & messaging, strengthening customer value for Nutritionist / Formulation Manager (Power User), and evolving delivery across web, Unified API Gateway.

Delivery Console (Team Builds-as-a-Service) initiative focused on improving ci/cd & release management, observability (logs/metrics/tracing), strengthening customer value for IT Manager, and evolving delivery across web, Blueprint API.

linkedReleases.description: Release of Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange improvements covering supplier onboarding & qualification, spec exchange & change notifications across web, Supplier Spec API.
Release of Integration & API Fabric improvements covering api gateway & service interfaces, event streaming & messaging across web, Unified API Gateway.
Release of Delivery Console (Team Builds-as-a-Service) improvements covering ci/cd & release management, observability (logs/metrics/tracing) across web, Blueprint API.

Release of Executive Command Center improvements covering unified kpi dashboards, cost & margin drivers analytics across web, mobile.
